articles.title: BREAKING: Rumors of Fidelity’s Spot Ethereum Application Spread
articles.description: According to breaking information, the claim that Fidelity has applied for a spot Ethereum ETF under the name of Wise Origin Ethereum Index Fund is keeping the agenda busy. articles.title: Second-Largest Stablecoin USDC Launches on Ethereum (ETH) Competitor NEAR Protocol (NEAR)
articles.description: The second-largest stablecoin by market cap, USD Coin (USDC), is now available natively on the Ethereum (ETH) competitor NEAR Protocol (NEAR). In addition to NEAR, USDC is also available natively on Algorand (ALGO), Arbitrum ( ARB), Avalanche (AVAX), Base, Ethereum, Flow, Hedera (HBAR), Noble, Optimism (OP), Solana (SOL), Stellar (XLM), and Tron (TRX). Explains USDC’s issuer […]

articles.title: Cardano ($ADA) Holds Third Spot in Crypto Development Activity, Behind Polkadot ($DOT) and Kusama ($KSM)
articles.description: The smart contract platform Cardano ($ADA) has maintained its third place when it comes to cryptocurrency networks in terms of development activity, behind the “blockchain of blockchains” Polkadot ($DOT) and its public pre-production environment Kusama ($KSM). That’s according to data from on-chain analytics firm Santiment, which details Polkadot has managed to maintain its position as […]
